title: llerasia assuensis
side_effects: Llerasia assuensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. In severe cases, it may cause respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and coughing. Additionally, improper use of the plant has been linked to allergic reactions, including skin irritation and itching.
